title: pavonia salmonea
intro: Pavonia salmonea, also known as Rose Mallow or Pavonia, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pavonia salmonea include wound healing, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Pavonia salmonea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their effects.
